Warranty.title: Warranty Policy

covered.title: What's Covered
covered.battery: Manufacturing faults affecting battery performance under the product terms
covered.charging: Charging or power faults caused by a manufacturing defect
covered.ports: Manufacturing defects in ports or connectors

howToClaim.title: How to Claim Warranty
howToClaim.step1: Contact us via WhatsApp with your order number
howToClaim.step4: Receive the inspection result and available remedy under the warranty terms

FAQ.metaDescription: Find answers to common questions about ordering, shipping, warranty, and products.
FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: Find quick answers to your questions
FAQ.contactUs: Our team is ready to assist you

ordering.title: Ordering
ordering.q1: How do I place an order?
ordering.a1: Simply browse our products, add items to cart, and checkout. You can pay on delivery.
ordering.q2: Can I modify my order after placing it?
ordering.a2: Contact us as soon as possible; whether an order can be changed depends on its packing and shipping status.
ordering.q3: Is there a minimum order amount?
ordering.a3: No minimum order. However, orders under 3,700 EGP have a 70-130 EGP shipping fee depending on governorate.

shipping.title: Shipping
shipping.a1: The estimate is commonly 1-2 business days for Cairo and Giza and 3-5 business days for other eligible addresses, but it can vary by address and carrier.
shipping.a2: We send tracking information by WhatsApp after dispatch when the carrier provides a tracking link.
shipping.q3: Do you deliver to my area?
shipping.a3: We serve eligible addresses within Egypt. Our team confirms delivery availability and cost before the order is finalized.

warranty.title: Warranty
warranty.a1: Eligible Anker and Soundcore products carry an 18-month CairoVolt store warranty, while eligible Joyroom products carry 12 months unless a specific product page states otherwise. The product page and order confirmation record the terms applicable at purchase.
warranty.a2: Contact us on WhatsApp with your order number and describe the issue.
warranty.a3: Warranty is tied to the original purchase, not transferable.

products.title: Products
products.a1: We sell each item under the brand and model identified on its product page, with the available images and specifications. A CairoVolt warranty record is not a manufacturer authenticity certificate; match the model and packaging on receipt and use the written return policy if anything differs.
products.q2: What's the difference between Anker and Joyroom?
products.a2: Power, ports, compatibility, price, and warranty vary by model. Compare the actual product details rather than relying on the brand name alone.
products.a3: Absolutely! Contact us on WhatsApp and we'll help you choose the right product.

payment.title: Payment
payment.q1: What payment methods do you accept?
payment.a1: Cash on Delivery (COD) is our main payment method.
payment.a2: Currently we only accept Cash on Delivery.
payment.a3: Cash on delivery is the current payment method. Review the order summary, price, and shipping cost before confirmation, and the return policy if an issue appears after receipt.

powerBanks.q: Is this power bank allowed on airplanes?
powerBanks.a: Acceptance depends on the watt-hour (Wh) rating and the airline and route rules. Portable batteries are commonly carried in cabin baggage, but confirm with the airline before travel.

powerBanks.q: Does it support fast charging for iPhone?
powerBanks.a: Fast charging works only when the power-bank model, device, and cable support the required protocol, such as USB-C PD. Actual speed varies by device, temperature, and battery level.

powerBanks.q: How many times can it charge my phone?
powerBanks.a: Charge count is an estimate affected by phone battery size, conversion losses, and use while charging. Compare watt-hours (Wh) and review the estimate for the specific model.

audio.q: Do they work with both iPhone and Android?
audio.a: Models using standard Bluetooth work with devices that support it, while app features, codecs, and multipoint support vary by model and phone operating system.
Check the specific model's IP rating and manufacturer limits. Not every earbud model is water resistant, and an IP rating does not necessarily make it suitable for swimming.
ANC is available only on selected models. Check the product page; actual performance varies with fit and the type of surrounding noise.

wallChargers.q: Does fast charging damage the battery?
wallChargers.a: The device manages charging current when a compatible charger and cable are used, but heat, use, and battery age still matter. Choose the correct power and protocol and do not use damaged accessories.
The choice depends on the maximum power and protocol supported by the device. A higher-rated charger does not guarantee higher speed when the device or cable cannot use it.

wallChargers.q: Does it come with a cable?
wallChargers.a: The charger head (Cube) usually doesn't include a cable unless specified in the contents.

cables.q: Is the cable Apple MFi certified?
cables.a: MFi certification depends on the cable model and connector. Check the model, packaging, and manufacturer or Apple certification records when MFi status is required.

cables.q: How long is the cable warranty?
cables.a: The CairoVolt warranty duration and scope appear on the cable page. Eligible defects are handled under the written terms; ordinary wear or bending damage is not covered unless the terms say otherwise.

About.metaDescription: CairoVolt is an online retailer of Anker and Joyroom mobile accessories in Egypt, with clear prices and written policies.
About.title: About CairoVolt
About.subtitle: An online mobile-accessories retailer with clear purchase information and written policies in Egypt

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: We aim to state the brand, model, specifications, price, and availability clearly, with customer support and written CairoVolt warranty terms for eligible products.

relationship.title: Our Relationship With Brands
relationship.description: CairoVolt is an independent online retailer in Egypt. We do not claim to be the official agent or authorized distributor of Anker, Soundcore, or Joyroom, and the CairoVolt warranty is not a manufacturer warranty, unless a specific product page expressly says otherwise and provides verifiable documentation. Brand names and logos belong to their owners and are used to identify products offered for sale. CairoVolt is a brand of Taysir Smart Investment LLC, registered in Egypt under Commercial Register No. 8446 (GAFI, Gamasa Investment Office), based in New Damietta.

original.title: Clear Product Details
original.description: Brand, model, specifications, and price are shown before purchase

warranty.title: CairoVolt Warranty
warranty.description: Duration and coverage are stated on each eligible product page

prices.title: Clear Prices
prices.description: The EGP price and shipping cost are shown before order confirmation

support.title: WhatsApp Support
support.description: Support via WhatsApp during working hours

brands.title: Our Brands
brands.anker: Charging products including power banks, chargers, and cables across several models.
brands.joyroom: Accessories across earbuds, power banks, cables, and car-product categories.

Team.heroDescription: This page collects links to independent tech creators whose reviews may help with comparison. They do not work for CairoVolt or write this site's content, and inclusion does not imply a partnership or mutual endorsement.

methodology.title: Editorial & Review Methodology
methodology.description: CairoVolt content is reviewed through editorial steps intended to clarify sources and distinguish specifications from estimates.

testing.title: Product Specification Research
testing.description: We review model identifiers, published specifications, and compatibility requirements before publication.

review.title: Editorial Review
review.description: Manufacturer specifications, calculated estimates, and buying guidance are clearly distinguished.

verification.title: Data Checks
verification.description: Details are checked against product documentation, labels, or manufacturer pages when available.

update.title: Periodic Updates
update.description: Content is updated when specifications, pricing, or known availability changes.

Privacy.metaDescription: Learn how CairoVolt handles and protects your personal information and privacy.
Privacy.title: Privacy Policy

collection.title: Information We Collect
collection.content:
We collect information you provide when placing an order, including:
• Name, phone number, and contact details
• Shipping address and governorate
• Products, quantities, order value, and order history
• Support messages or warranty claims you send us
Technical data is also collected when you use the site, such as IP address, browser and device type, viewed pages, interaction events, and cookie or advertising identifiers where enabled.

usage.title: How We Use Your Information
usage.content:
We use information to:
• Record an order, validate its price and availability, process it, and arrange delivery
• Send order updates and provide support by WhatsApp, phone, or email
• Operate customer service and manage orders in internal business systems
• Measure site and campaign performance and improve usability
• Prevent abuse and protect the site and orders
• Handle returns, warranty requests, and applicable legal obligations

sharing.title: Information Sharing
sharing.content:
We share the minimum data needed for each purpose with:
• Shipping companies to fulfil an order and communicate about delivery
• Payment processors if online payment is added
• Hosting, security, order-management, and customer-service providers, including CRM systems and Google Sheets used for operations
• Google Analytics and Google Ads to measure visits and campaigns
• TikTok Pixel and TikTok Events API to measure site and campaign events; technical data can include IP address and browser type, and a phone number used for advertising matching is sent as a SHA-256 hash rather than visible text
• Authorities where disclosure is legally required
We do not sell personal data for money. Service providers may process it only under their services and terms for the stated operational or measurement purposes.

security.title: Data Security
security.content: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, or destruction.

cookies.title: Cookies and Measurement Tools
cookies.content: The site uses local storage, cookies, and similar technologies to operate the cart, remember preferences, and measure visits and campaigns through Google and TikTok. You can delete or block cookies in your browser and use Google and TikTok advertising-personalization settings. Blocking necessary storage may prevent the cart or some features from working.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content:
You may request to:
• Access personal data we hold about you
• Correct inaccurate data
• Delete data where a legal, accounting, or active-dispute obligation does not require retention
• Stop marketing communications
• Object to advertising measurement where applicable
We will request enough information to verify the requester before acting on a data-rights request.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: For privacy questions or requests, email support@cairovolt.com or contact 01558245974 on WhatsApp and state that the request concerns privacy. We will acknowledge the request and ask for enough information to verify the data subject before acting.

Terms.metaDescription: Read the terms and conditions for shopping at CairoVolt.
Terms.title: Terms & Conditions

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By placing an order on CairoVolt, you agree to these terms and conditions. Please read them carefully before making a purchase.

orders.title: Orders
orders.content:
• All orders are subject to availability
• We reserve the right to refuse or cancel orders
• Order confirmation will be sent via WhatsApp
• Prices are in Egyptian Pounds (EGP)

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.content: Product prices are displayed in Egyptian Pounds. Shipping and the final order total are shown before confirmation. Prices may change before confirmation; a confirmed order keeps the price and total recorded in its confirmation unless there is an obvious display error that we contact you about before fulfilment.

shipping.title: Shipping & Delivery
shipping.content:
• Delivery times are estimates, not guarantees
• Free shipping for orders of 3,700 EGP or more
• Cash on Delivery is available for eligible orders and addresses
• Risk of loss transfers upon delivery

returns.title: Returns & Exchanges
returns.content:
• Eligible products may be requested for return within 14 days if unused and in original packaging
• Eligible defects are reviewed under the return policy or the product's written warranty
• Return shipping costs may apply
• Refunds are commonly processed within 5-7 business days after the product is received and inspected

warranty.title: Product Warranty
warranty.content: Eligible products include a written CairoVolt warranty. Duration and coverage vary by model and are stated on the product page and in the warranty policy. CairoVolt warranty is not a manufacturer-issued warranty unless that relationship is expressly stated with verifiable documentation.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: CairoVolt is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages. Our liability is limited to the purchase price of the product.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting. Continued use constitutes acceptance of modified terms.

ReturnPolicy.metaDescription: Review CairoVolt's 14-day return eligibility, inspection, refund steps, and return-shipping terms for purchases in Egypt.
ReturnPolicy.title: Return & Refund Policy

window.title: Return Window
window.description: From the date of delivery. Products must be in original, unused condition.

eligible.title: Eligible for Return
eligible.unused: Product is unused and in its original condition
eligible.originalPackaging: Original packaging and box are intact and undamaged
eligible.accessories: All included accessories, cables, and manuals are present
eligible.receipt: Proof of purchase (order number or WhatsApp confirmation)

nonReturnable.title: Non-Returnable Items
nonReturnable.opened: Earbuds or audio products that have been opened or used (hygiene reasons)
nonReturnable.damaged: Products with physical damage (scratches, dents, cracks)
nonReturnable.misuse: Products damaged due to misuse, negligence, or unauthorized modification
nonReturnable.noPackaging: Products returned without original packaging or missing accessories

howToReturn.title: How to Return
howToReturn.step1: Contact us via WhatsApp (01558245974) with your order number and reason for return
howToReturn.step2: Our team reviews the request and documents, then confirms eligibility and the next step
howToReturn.step3: Ship the product back or we'll arrange a pickup (Cairo & Giza)
howToReturn.step4: Refund is processed once the product is received and inspected

refund.title: Refund Details
refund.businessDays: business days after receiving the item
refund.methodDescription: Refunds are issued via Vodafone Cash, InstaPay, or bank transfer — your choice.
refund.shippingNote: Note: Original shipping fees are non-refundable unless the return is due to a defective product or an error on our part.

defective.title: Defective Products
defective.description: Received a defective or damaged product? We've got you covered:
defective.freeReturn: CairoVolt covers return shipping when a product defect or our order error is confirmed
defective.fullRefund: Refund or replacement follows the inspection result and the published policy terms
defective.warranty: After the return window, the case is reviewed under the product's written warranty duration and terms

contact.title: Need Help with a Return?
contact.description: Our team is available to assist you with any return or exchange questions.
